title: PipiMod
description: Adds the new "PIPI" mob,      what we've all been waiting for !
body:
Oh great silly! This mod adds the new mob: "Pipi"! What we've all been waiting for. Pipi is based off of the critter of the same name from this tweet: https://twitter.com/fake_orchestra/status/1629872179490766850 The textures, sounds, and model were made by the original creator. Pipis are delightful frolickers that roam around the forests of your world. their flower can be dyed to any of your favorite colors, and then sheared off to be planted elsewhere! (don't worry, they grow back !)

pshh... you're just a STANDARD pipi. nothing special.

UShroom PIPI ???????? WOWWWWWWWWWWWWWW
